test_cases.label: Web Portal Registration
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3001 and find the registration or sign-up link/button. Complete a new user registration using a unique phone number (e.g. 07{{RANDOM_6_DIGITS}} or use 0771234999 if no variable available), a first name 'Test', last name 'User', and a password 'Test@12345'. Submit the form. Return 'SUCCESS' if registration completed or the account already exists message appears, otherwise describe exactly what went wrong including any validation errors or missing fields.

test_cases.label: Web Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3001 and log in using phone {{WEB_PHONE}} and password {{WEB_PASSWORD}}. Stop as soon as the authenticated dashboard or home screen is visible. Return 'SUCCESS' if login worked, otherwise describe what went wrong.

test_cases.label: Web Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on http://95.111.238.19:3001 already logged in (phone={{WEB_PHONE}}, password={{WEB_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed). Open at least five distinct navigation modules, perform safe read-only interactions in each (search, filter, or open a detail view), and confirm there are no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to http://95.111.238.19:3002 and log in using username {{ADMIN_USERNAME}} and password {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}. Stop as soon as the admin dashboard or home screen is visible. Return 'SUCCESS' if login worked, otherwise describe what went wrong.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on http://95.111.238.19:3002 already logged in (username={{ADMIN_USERNAME}}, password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed). Open at least five distinct admin modules, perform safe read-only interactions in each, and confirm no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.

workflows.label: Web Regression
workflows.description: Registration, login, and smoke checks for web portal
